summary: Live-applied ADR 0194 from `codex/ws-0194-live-apply`, converged the dedicated Coolify guest plus shared edge publication, restored the private controller registration flow, brought up the guest-side `coolify-proxy`, and re-verified repo-backed deployment through `repo-smoke.apps.lv3.org`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_coolify_tool.py tests/test_coolify_runtime_role.py tests/test_coolify_playbook.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py -q` passed with `53 passed in 1.01s` on 2026-03-28.
`make converge-coolify` completed successfully on 2026-03-28 and converged `proxmox_florin`, `coolify-lv3`, and `nginx-lv3` without failures.

verification.check: Private controller registration and auth artifacts
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/coolify_tool.py whoami` reported controller URL `http://100.64.0.1:8012`, public URL `https://coolify.lv3.org`, apps URL `https://apps.lv3.org`, version `4.0.0-beta.470`, team `Root Team`, and local server `coolify-lv3` as reachable plus usable.

`ss -ltnp | egrep '(:80|:443|:8000|:8080)'` on `coolify-lv3` showed listeners on `80`, `443`, `8000`, and `8080`, and `docker ps --no-trunc` showed healthy `coolify-proxy`, `coolify`, `coolify-db`, `coolify-redis`, `coolify-realtime`, and `coolify-sentinel` containers plus the repo-smoke application container.

`python3 scripts/coolify_tool.py deploy-repo --repo https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify-examples --branch main --base-directory /static --app-name repo-smoke --build-pack static --subdomain repo-smoke --wait --timeout 900` finished successfully with deployment `a13akq7v9de7vyqo5u33pz0y` for application `r4z9zeqpci7uykiw3bj08hrf`.

Direct probes against `65.108.75.123` using `--resolve` returned `302` for `https://coolify.lv3.org/`, `200` for `https://repo-smoke.apps.lv3.org/`, and `404` for `https://apps.lv3.org/` while no apex app is assigned. Fetching `https://repo-smoke.apps.lv3.org/` returned the expected Coolify example page content.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed cleanly after fixing the branch-registry and zero-match arithmetic handling in `scripts/validate_repo.sh`. `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` still reports `versions/stack.yaml.desired_state.guest_network_plan keys must match the managed guest fleet` because `versions/stack.yaml` is intentionally protected on this workstream branch until merge-to-main.

notes: At verification time, `dig +short` from the controller returned no public answers for `coolify.lv3.org`, `apps.lv3.org`, or `repo-smoke.apps.lv3.org`, so this receipt records successful direct edge verification with `curl --resolve ... 65.108.75.123` separately from DNS visibility.

This workstream branch intentionally does not update `VERSION`, release sections in `changelog.md`, the top-level integrated status summary in `README.md`, or `versions/stack.yaml`. Those shared integration updates remain for the final merge-to-main step.

The worktree carried `build/docs-portal` and `build/changelog-portal` artifacts copied from the main workspace so edge publication could converge without prematurely changing the canonical generated-state workflow on this branch. Regenerate those portals from merged `main` during final integration.
